text:
1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1: Voluntary 
2: Proprietary 
3: Government 
4: Voluntary/Proprietary 
5: Proprietary/Government 
6: Voluntary/Government 
7: Not applicable 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: Derived from the OWNRSHP_CD, using the last-best method for values from the monthly TAF 
(calendar year). 

OWNRSHP_CTGRY_CD is set to: 
1 when OWNRSHP_CD equals “01” through “03” 
2 when OWNRSHP_CD equals “04” through “08” 
3 when OWNRSHP_CD equals “09” through
